# nomad_volumes (Data Source)

Retrieve a list of volumes in Nomad.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_volumes" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `namespace` (String) Volume namespace filter
- `node_id` (String) Volume node filter
- `plugin_id` (String) Plugin ID filter
- `type` (String) Volume Type (currently only 'csi')

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `volumes` (List of Map of String) Volumes
